creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of sysutils/dtc port,

I've made a patch, based on dtcBSDport, that unbreak the port and update
it to 0.32.0.1.

Do you approve this?

Thanks
-- 
Renato Botelho <garga @ FreeBSD.org>
               <garga @ freebsdbrasil.com.br>
GnuPG Key: http://www.FreeBSD.org/~garga/pubkey.asc

Too much of a good thing is WONDERFUL.
		-- Mae West
